mechanics.raw_text:
(Like wow, dude, What an unusual thing to find in a Paranoia adventure.) Chop the interior out and cut up all of the cargo counters, When the characters attempt to load their equipment ‘onto the MTV, drop the stuff in the middle of the table. Explain the stacking rules found on pages 121-122) to the players and cheerfully fenguite as 10 how they are going to fit ‘everything in the vehicle, (No coaching, now!)
